src: An automatic theorem prover in OCaml for typed higher-order logic with equality and datatypes, based on superposition+rewriting; and Logtk, a supporting library for manipulating terms, formulas, clauses, etc.
ja: 等式とデータ型を持つ型付き高階論理向けのOCaml製自動定理証明器（superposition+rewritingベース）、およびterm・formula・clauseなどの操作を支援するライブラリLogtk
